pokemon:golisopod.name: Golisopod
pokemon:golisopod.summary: It battles skillfully with its six arms, but spends most of its time peacefully meditating in caves deep beneath the sea.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It battles skillfully with its six arms, but spends most of its time peacefully meditating in caves deep beneath the sea.
They live in sunken ships or in holes in the seabed. When Golisopod and Grapploct battle, the loser becomes the winner’s meal.
With a flashing slash of its giant sharp claws, it cleaves seawater—or even air—right in two.
It will do anything to win, taking advantage of every opening and finishing opponents off with the small claws on its front legs.
Its claws, which it can extend and retract at will, are its greatest weapons. Golisopod is sometimes accompanied by Wimpod.
The shell covering its body is as hard as diamond. This Pokémon will do anything it takes to win.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It battles skillfully with its six arms, but spends most of its time peacefully meditating in caves deep beneath the sea.

pokemon:wimpod.name: Wimpod
pokemon:wimpod.summary: Its habitat varies from beaches to seabeds. A natural scavenger, it will gleefully chow down on anything edible, no matter how rotten.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Its habitat varies from beaches to seabeds. A natural scavenger, it will gleefully chow down on anything edible, no matter how rotten.
Wimpod gather in swarms, constantly on the lookout for danger. They scatter the moment they detect an enemy’s presence.
This Pokémon is a coward. As it desperately dashes off, the flailing of its many legs leaves a sparkling clean path in its wake.
It’s nature’s cleaner—it eats anything and everything, including garbage and rotten things. The ground near its nest is always clean.
An astonishingly cowardly Pokémon, Wimpod will whir its legs at high speeds to run away if anything comes near it.
It will pick up anything it finds on the ground. Sometimes it finds coins, so Murkrow and Meowth will go after it.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Its habitat varies from beaches to seabeds. A natural scavenger, it will gleefully chow down on anything edible, no matter how rotten.
